prose:
**Water HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: read from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` (single‐point calculation; no geometry relaxation). SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → **gap = 8.9406687 eV**.
Reproducibility:
• Command invocation:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 --solvent gas /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out orbitals_water.json`
• Results JSON: `orbitals_water.json`
• Live log: `frontier-<timestamp>.out` (streaming from the engine’s stdout)
